title: GARBAGE BILL FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF PORTLAND BUREAU OF PLANNING AND SUSTAINABILITY GARBAGE BILL FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a $21.90 monthly garbage bill discount. Rates are updated annually in July. 1810 SW 5th Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Must meet all of the following: Own and live in a single-family house Be the account holder for both your garbage bill and your sewer, stormwater, and water bill Be enrolled in the Portland Water Bureau's financial assistance program and receive Tier 2 rate relief Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 823-7202 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 823-7700 Administration Main phone (503) 823-7202 Garbage and Recycling Hotline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Trash/Recycling Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - INCREASED GARBAGE SERVICE PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - HOME ENERGY SCORE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF PORTLAND BUREAU OF PLANNING AND SUSTAINABILITY
